title: Drum Inputs, IEM Sends and FX Returns
brief: Patch the full drum kit into stagebox inputs 1-8, patch five FOH aux outputs to five IEM inputs, send two stereo bus pairs to reverb and delay, then return the stereo effects to FOH input channels 9-12.

puzzle.scenario: You are assembling a compact show patch that combines drum inputs, five mono aux-to-IEM monitor feeds, stereo FX sends, and stereo FX returns.
puzzle.objective: Patch the drum mics to stagebox inputs 1-8, route Aux 1-5 to IEM inputs 1-5, send Bus 1-4 to reverb and delay inputs in stereo pairs, and return both FX processors to FOH inputs 9-12.

constraints.text: Inputs, monitor sends, and FX returns serve different signal-flow roles.

puzzle.completionExplanation: The completed patch keeps drum inputs on stagebox inputs 1-8, five mono aux monitor feeds on IEM inputs 1-5, stereo bus sends on the reverb and delay inputs, and stereo FX returns on FOH inputs 9-12.
puzzle.migrationNotes: Corrected after source-route audit: LIV-019 uses 8 drum mic stagebox routes, five mono Aux-to-IEM monitor feeds, stereo reverb/delay sends, and stereo FX returns. It remains needs-review because the board has locked scroll, label, hitbox, stagebox, finalizer, and native cable behavior that must be preserved before any source manifest is created.

stereoGroups.purpose: Preserve overhead left/right drum input order into stagebox inputs 7-8.
Preserve stereo reverb send left/right order from FOH Bus 1/2 to reverb inputs.
Preserve stereo delay send left/right order from FOH Bus 3/4 to delay inputs.
Preserve stereo reverb return left/right order into FOH inputs 9-10.
Preserve stereo delay return left/right order into FOH inputs 11-12.

labels.text: Drum Inputs, IEM Sends and FX Returns: preserve locked LIV-019 route, hitbox, scroll, label, and cable behavior.
